text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Snacky snacks! ♪ Hey, Dia, what should our next
challenge be?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hm... We've already tried the Habanero Hot
Carrot Gummies and the Supersized 50cm Cleat
Candies...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this place is a gold mine of strange
goodies! I've never seen this stuff anywhere else.
Where does the academy even get it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look over there! They have Umamusume
cookies!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I remember these. They have the letters of the
alphabet on them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're right... Hehe, it's so nostalgic.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't long after we became friends. These
cookies were the first snack we shared in the
park.

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
A nice customer gave me these! Let's eat them
together, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Snacks in my household are always served on a
plate...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So to eat something straight out of the packaging
for the first time made me so happy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that really happened? You've got a really
good memory.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I remember this part, at least! You took
the cookies and spelled "Kita" with them!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Cool, guess we're having these today! The
weather's great, so how about we take them
outside?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! It'll be just like that time at the park.
